## Test plan

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --all-targets`
- [ ] `RUSTDOCFLAGS='-D warnings' cargo doc --no-deps`
- [ ] If an example changed visually: regenerated the GIF via `vhs tapes/<name>.tape`
